ItacAcademyItem.Name: Accesi-Roma (Accademia degli)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: The Accesi Academy is mentioned by Malatesta Garuffi, Italia Accademica (Rimini 1688), and by Stefano Cartari, Discorsi sacri e morali (Roma, 1673)
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
